sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104865" key="trigli=tis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τριγλ-ῖτις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a kind of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀφύη,</foreign> <sense id="n104865.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τρίγλη,</foreign> Id.ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0008.tlg001.perseus-grc1:285a" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">285a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
